mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT session_id, user_id FROM chat_memory_obsolete
SELECT id, agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, create_time FROM chat_memory_obsolete WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT id, agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, create_time FROM chat_memory_obsolete WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND id > #{lastId} ORDER BY id ASC, create_time ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_memory_obsolete WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND id <= #{maxId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_memory_obsolete (id, agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{chatMemory.id}, #{chatMemory.agentId}, #{chatMemory.userId}, #{chatMemory.messageId}, #{chatMemory.messageJson}, #{chatMemory.status}, #{chatMemory.sessionId}, #{chatMemory.createTime})
